issues.message: Missing metadata fields: Trademark, Manufacturer URL, Designer URL, Sample Text
OS/2 Unicode range bit 25 (Kannada) is not set
Missing required glyph: ಼ U+0CBC – Sign Nukta
Missing 6 revival/archaic glyph(s): ಌ (U+0C8C), ೡ (U+0CE1), ೢ (U+0CE2), ೣ (U+0CE3), ೱ (U+0CF1), ೲ (U+0CF2)
Missing required feature "nukt" (Nukta Forms): Nukta + consonant → modified consonant glyph
Missing required feature "akhn" (Akhand): Mandatory ligatures: ಕ್ಷ (ksha), ಜ್ಞ (jnya)
Missing required feature "vatu" (Vattu Variants): Below-base Ra (vattu) joining forms
Missing required feature "cjct" (Conjunct Forms): Full conjunct ligatures (ottakshara)
Missing required feature "pres" (Pre-base Substitutions): Matras appearing before base consonant
Missing required feature "abvs" (Above-base Substitutions): Anusvara, chandrabindu above base
Missing required feature "mark" (Mark Positioning): Diacritic attachment to base glyphs
No Mark-to-Base positioning (lookup type 4) found – vowel signs may not attach correctly
6 glyph(s) have Unicode mappings but no path data (e.g. uni0000, uni000D, space, uni200B, uni200C)
1 Kannada glyph(s) have unusual advance widths vs. median (621 units)

copyright.label: Copyright
copyright.value: Karnata F Kittel Project Authors Prashant Pandit

description.label: Description
description.value:
Karnata F Kittel font is a digital revival of an existing foundry typeface created in erstwhile Basel Mission Press Mangalore between 1830-1900. This font is an attempt to re-create the typeface that resembles a lot with the "Kannada Longprimer No 2" which was supposedly created with the supervision of master founder George Plebst at Basel Mission Press, Mangalore.

The font has been named after lexicographer, linguist & philologist Ferdinand Kittel (1832-1904) as a mark of honour to his immense scholarly contribution to the Kannada language.

Project Head: Prashant Pandit
Graphics Support: Sachin Shetty
Technical Support: Satish AG

required.desc: Consonants that descend below the baseline

required.desc: U, UU, R matras below consonant

recommended.desc: Consonant forms that appear after the base

recommended.name: Distances
recommended.desc: Inter-character spacing (preferred over kern for Indic)
